buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0f7e75] to-[#0c9c8f] text-[#fffffe] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-[#0f7e75]/20 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-[#0f7e75]/40 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0f7e75] border border-[#0f7e75]/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#eef5f3] transition-all duration-300
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md text-white border border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-white/20 transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-100 shadow-xl shadow-[#0f7e75]/5 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-[#0f7e75]/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-xl shadow-[#053433]/5
cards.dark: bg-[#053433] text-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-white/10

dashboard_mockup.container: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/20 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
dashboard_mockup.widgets: bg-white rounded-xl p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100

motion_and_interactions.fade_up: initial opacity-0 translate-y-8, animate opacity-100 translate-y-0
motion_and_interactions.floating: animate y [-10px, 10px] infinite alternate duration 3s ease-in-out

sections_sequence.name: Navbar
sections_sequence.description: Sticky with backdrop blur (Glassmorphism). Logo + Links (Home, Features, AI Tools, Case Management, Pricing, Contact) + Login & Get Started buttons.

sections_sequence.name: Hero
sections_sequence.description: Gradient background (#053433 to #0f7e75 to #0c9c8f). Headline: 'Your Complete Digital Chamber for Modern Legal Practice'. Get Started button. Floating premium legal dashboard mockup built with HTML/Tailwind showing Today's Hearings, Upcoming Cases, Recent Judgments, AI Summary, Notifications, Calendar, Client Overview, Case Status, Quick Actions. Built as a sleek Bento grid.

sections_sequence.name: Trusted By
sections_sequence.description: Light background (#eef5f3). 'Trusted by Law Firms, Advocates & Legal Professionals Across Pakistan'. Grayscale abstract law firm logos (use Lucide icons like Scale, Landmark, Shield, BookOpen, Briefcase) acting as logos.

sections_sequence.name: Features
sections_sequence.description: 'Everything Your Law Firm Needs'. Large rounded cards. Smart Dashboard, Pakistani Case Search across Supreme/High/Sessions courts with filters, Judgment Library. Include subtle hover lifts.

sections_sequence.name: AI Features
sections_sequence.description: 'Powered by Artificial Intelligence'. Dark background (#053433) section. AI Judgment Summarizer, AI Social Media Generator, AI Application Generator. Glassmorphism cards on the dark bg.

sections_sequence.name: Case Management
sections_sequence.description: 'Manage Every Case in One Place'. Split layout: text/features on one side, dashboard UI mockup graphic (built in React) on the other. Soft shadows.

sections_sequence.name: Cross Examination & Smart Notifications
sections_sequence.description: Bento grid layout. Cross Examination collaboration tool visual, alongside Smart Notifications 'Never Miss Another Hearing' with overlapping notification cards (Framer motion hover lift).

sections_sequence.name: Legal News
sections_sequence.description: 'Latest Pakistani Legal Updates'. Cards with images of modern courthouses. Clean spacing.

sections_sequence.name: Admin Panel & Statistics
sections_sequence.description: 'Built for Law Firms'. Animated counters (use Framer Motion useInView to trigger count): 20+ Practice Areas, 100K+ Judgments Indexed, 50K+ Cases Managed, 99.9% System Availability, 24/7 Legal Intelligence.

sections_sequence.name: Pricing
sections_sequence.description: 3 tiers (e.g., Solo Advocate, Law Firm, Enterprise). Center card highlighted with primary gradient border/button.

sections_sequence.name: Testimonials
sections_sequence.description: 'Trusted by Lawyers Across Pakistan'. Grid of cards with lawyer headshots, 5-star ratings, and quotes.

sections_sequence.name: Final CTA
sections_sequence.description: Gradient section (#053433 to #0f7e75). 'Transform Your Law Practice with Legal Portal'. Large heading, email input or direct Get Started button.

sections_sequence.name: Footer
sections_sequence.description: Clean footer with links, newsletter signup, social icons. Dark background.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key informational elements.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided media_urls or build UI mockups with Tailwind + Lucide icons.
Implement the floating dashboard mockup in the Hero section using actual HTML/Tailwind to look like a premium SaaS app window.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveal animations (staggered fade up) and floating elements.
Ensure headings use Playfair Display (font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif) and body uses Inter.
Enforce the specific color palette exactly: #0f7e75 (primary), #0c9c8f (secondary), #053433 (dark bg), #eef5f3 (light bg), #fffffe (white).
